headline: The people who actually look at your file.

people.name: Our Founder
people.bio: 20+ years in investor lending. Reviews every file personally.
people.quote: I built this for landlords because I am one. The rate doesn't matter. What matters is whether you walk away cash-flowing.

people.name: Senior Processing Team
people.bio: Runs every file through 4-5 pricing engines and 7 wholesale lenders to find the best terms.
people.quote: Tell us everything up front. The more we know, the harder we can fight for your number.
